summary: Retested Focus Mode challenge picker flow on mobile viewport (375x667). Modal Opens on focus-escape tap, shows all 3 challenge options (20 Push-ups, 4 Breath Cycles, Keep Focusing). Tapping challenge-pushups navigates to pushup screen with pushup-count 0/20 and functional pushup-tap button (increments to 1 on tap). Tapping challenge-breathing shows breath-orb with breathing animation. All 4 requested test cases PASSED.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' (non-blocking, cosmetic).
Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web (expected in web preview, non-blocking).

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Modal JSX is rendered even when in 'challenge' sub-screens (unreachable since those return early), which is fine but results in slight dead conditional rendering. No action needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Focus Mode challenge picker (/focus) fully working. Modal with testID='challenge-picker' appears on focus-escape tap when mode='running'. challenge-pushups → pushup screen (pushup-count, pushup-tap). challenge-breathing → breath-orb visible. challenge-cancel closes modal.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no issues found. Previously reported missing modal JSX has been properly added at lines 233-278 of /app/frontend/app/focus.tsx and is functioning as expected.
